identity.mission: Create a futuristic, immersive, and secure authentication experience that breaks generic SaaS molds.
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Cyberpunk aesthetics with Swiss Grid precision.
Content is King: The login flow is the first scene of the movie.
Negative Space: Use deep black voids to make neon elements pop.
Contrast: High-contrast text against dark backgrounds for accessibility.

theme_strategy.rationale: Futuristic/Cyberpunk themes require dark mode to allow neon accents and glows to function. Light mode is disabled for this specific brand identity.
theme_strategy.background_style: Deep Void (#050505) with subtle noise texture.

typography.instructions: Import fonts from Google Fonts. Use Rajdhani for all Headings (H1-H6) to give a technical/squared look. Use Outfit for Body text for high legibility.

primary.name: Neon Cyan
primary.usage: Primary Buttons, Active States, Focus Rings

hero_image.usage: Right side panel of the split-screen layout. Object of focus.

background_texture.usage: Subtle background overlay for the 'Forgot Password' or 'Reset Password' standalone pages.

login_register.structure: grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 h-screen w-full overflow-hidden
login_register.left_panel: flex flex-col justify-center px-8 md:px-20 lg:px-32 relative z-10 bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-md border-r border-white/5
login_register.right_panel: relative hidden lg:flex items-center justify-center bg-black overflow-hidden

standalone_pages.structure: min-h-screen w-full flex items-center justify-center bg-black relative p-4
standalone_pages.card_style: w-full max-w-md p-8 bg-neutral-900/60 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 rounded-2xl shadow-2xl relative z-10 overflow-hidden

buttons.primary: relative group overflow-hidden bg-white text-black font-bold uppercase tracking-widest py-3 px-6 hover:bg-cyan-400 transition-colors duration-300 rounded-none clip-path-cyberpunk
buttons.secondary: border border-white/20 text-white hover:bg-white/10 hover:border-white/50 uppercase tracking-widest py-3 px-6 transition-all duration-300
buttons.google_oauth: w-full flex items-center justify-center gap-2 bg-neutral-800 hover:bg-neutral-700 text-white py-3 border border-white/10 transition-all rounded-md

inputs.style: bg-transparent border-b border-white/20 focus:border-cyan-400 text-white placeholder:text-neutral-600 focus:outline-none focus:ring-0 py-3 px-0 transition-colors text-lg rounded-none
inputs.label: text-xs text-neutral-400 uppercase tracking-widest mb-1 block

card.style: bg-neutral-900/50 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10 p-8 rounded-xl shadow-2xl

micro_interactions.hover_effects: Buttons should glow or shift slightly on hover. Links should have a sliding underline.
micro_interactions.focus_states: Inputs should have a glowing bottom border (cyan or purple) on focus.
micro_interactions.loading_states: Use a geometric spinner or a progress bar that fills with a neon gradient.
micro_interactions.transitions: All color/opacity changes must be smooth (duration-300 ease-out).

universal_guidelines: Do NOT use default shadcn rounded corners (rounded-xl). Use 'rounded-md' or 'rounded-none' for a sharper, tech feel.
Ensure all text has sufficient contrast. Use 'text-neutral-300' for muted text, never lower.
Use 'lucide-react' icons with stroke-width={1.5} for a sleek look.
Avoid 'Inter' font. Use 'Rajdhani' for headers and 'Outfit' for body.
For the 'Remember Me' checkbox, customize the shadcn checkbox to be square and neon-active.
The Right Panel image (Torus) should have a slow 'scale-110' animation over 20s to create a breathing effect.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure neon colors are used as accents, not main text. Main text must be white or off-white.
accessibility.keyboard_nav: Focus rings must be visible (use ring-cyan-500/50).

implementation_steps: Step 1: Install fonts (Rajdhani, Outfit) via Google Fonts.
Step 3: Build the 'AuthLayout' component (Split Screen wrapper).
Step 5: Implement Login, Register, Forgot Password pages using the new components.
